{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324101234D8F6B1B966B6D06EA79D"}"},"total":216},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7266755240434385699","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不要被书名影响，这本小说个人觉得非常好看，全书角色几乎都是有自己思想的，甚至皇帝太子都不正经，这种不正经把本应严肃冷酷的利用被利用绝境出逃写的都颇为诙谐又不失生动。情节看似有个做善事的主线但小高潮的情节节点安排以及发展节奏都安排的特别好，读起来根本停不下来。可以说是设定套路但情节和描写能使原本的套路也能变得舒服很多，并且里面好哥们的互动也一直令人捧腹。作者加油快更"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691923369,"group_id":"7234052257099025408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8iHeRT4dNopNj+kkrr/XCRWOD5Y4sl3bdaYNcqt0ARQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ac7017979ba9464dbdb9a7d617a44874~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874461&x-signature=WhOPFyGr4BUXCwRZz1MpD1mp4No%3D","user_id":"4143388074714333","user_name":"墨非本非"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4143388074714333","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234052257099025408","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越异世，方浩绑定了良善系统，只要做好事就能获得善人值，善人值可购买各种天材地宝。
本以为能够走上人生巅峰的他，却坑爹的发现，自己身份竟是帮派老大。
方浩绞尽脑汁的想解散帮派，结果无论是手下还是敌人都思想迪化，疯狂脑补，让他的帮派越来越大。
